nasb.text: That they may see and recognize, And consider and gain insight as well, That the hand of the Lord has done this, And the Holy One of Israel has created it.

esv.text: that they may see and know, may consider and understand together, that the hand of the Lord has done this, the Holy One of Israel has created it.

cnv.text: 好叫人看見了，就知道； 思想過，就都明白， 這是耶和華的手所作的， 是以色列的聖者所造的。

ccb.text: 人一看就知道， 一想就明白， 这是耶和华亲手成就的， 是以色列的圣者创造的。”

csbs.text: 为要人看见就明白， 思索就一同明悟： 这是耶和华的手所做的， 是以色列的圣者所造的。
